creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text: The discussion in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=242528 looks relevant to this PR as well, so perhaps the solution is similar: a pkg-message for audio/gstreamer1-plugins-lame with install and remove messages. I'm unsure, however, where that pkg-message would live: in the slave port or the master port multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins.
